base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of subweapon_axe — a projectile from 1986 castlevania. Axe subweapon — thrown in high arc. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Axe subweapon — thrown in high arc; 4-frame rotation; useful for hitting enemies above. Heart cost 1
